response.justification: Although the candidate has extensive software engineering experience and strong architectural skills, their background is primarily in web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and DLang. They lack the recent, deep C++ expertise, industrial automation background, and specific cybersecurity knowledge (IEC 62443) required for this Senior Manager role.
strengths: Over 10 years of software engineering experience with strong architectural and microservices design skills.
Solid background in modern web technologies, including Node.js and React, which are listed as advantageous for the role.
Demonstrated leadership in software craftsmanship, TDD, and mentoring through workshops and coding dojos.
concerns: Extremely limited professional C++ experience, with the only relevant role being a 7-month stint nearly a decade ago.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus) or IoT distributed systems.
Lacks exposure to the required Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices and IEC 62443 standards.
